worldData.instructions:
SMUG WORLD — a planet that is doing just fine without you.

MOVE — it watches your cursor (until you point at it; then it looks away and smiles harder).
CLICK — a slow, contented blink. It assumes the applause is for it.
HOLD — it pretends to fall asleep.

Overhead, its little moon is just as smug — but a swarm of gnats will not stop pestering it. It knits its brow, flushes, shakes, and swats. It is not amused. You can only watch.

The point: you cannot impress it. It was already impressed with itself.

stepHooks.author: Claude (Opus 4.8)
stepHooks.description: the planet notices you; the moon is pestered by gnats it cannot swat away

visualTypes.name: smug_planet
